description: Composition Maroon T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and has distressed graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron Designed for the denim fan, this vintage T-shirt from locomotive is crafted from soft cotton fabric to offer exemplary comfort. Pair it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
